articles.title: HOW TO GET DEVELOPERS AND AI ASSISTANTS ON THE SAME PAGE
articles.summary: Ever notice how some devs get exactly what they need from AI on the first try?

articles.title: AI coding assistants. DX compiled specific techniques that work
articles.summary: for ideal human-AI collaboration: top use cases, battle-tested prompting techniques, and leadership strategies to drive responsible adoption.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC ECONOMIC ADVISORY COUNCIL
articles.summary: Anthropic announced the creation of a council of top economists to advise on the economic impacts of AI and guide research for its Anthropic Economic Index.

articles.title: HUGGING FACE 3D-PRINTED ROBOTIC ARM
articles.summary: Hugging Face is selling a programmable 3D-printable robotic arm called SO-101 that can pick up objects. It is a camera-equipped robotic arm with improved assembly and motor performance.

articles.title: OPENAI UPGRADES CHATGPT SEARCH WITH SHOPPING FEATURES
articles.summary: OpenAI has updated ChatGPT search to enhance online shopping by offering product recommendations, images, reviews, and purchase links. The new feature, part of its strategy to rival Google, uses structured metadata rather than ads, ensuring personalized and independent shopping results. OpenAI plans further personalization through ChatGPT's memory feature for Pro and Plus users, excluding some European regions.

articles.title: SPEEDING UP GRAPH LEARNING MODELS WITH TORCH.COMPILE
articles.summary: This article demonstrates how to boost PyTorch graph learning model speeds by up to 35% using PyG and torch.compile without losing model accuracy.

articles.title: DETECTING AND COUNTERING MALICIOUS USES OF CLAUDE
HANDLING MISSING LABELS WITH MULTIPLE IMPUTATION
articles.summary: This research introduced a multiple imputation method for evaluating classifiers with missing labels, offering accurate and robust predictive distributions even under MNAR conditions.

articles.title: UNLEARNING IN LLMS
articles.summary: ReLearn offers a data augmentation and fine-tuning pipeline for effective unlearning in large language models.

articles.title: GENERATIVE VIDEO MODELS FOR DRIVING
articles.summary: Valeo AI presents VaViM, an autoregressive video model that predicts spatio-temporal token sequences, and VaVAM, a model that translates learned video representations into driving trajectories via imitation learning.

articles.title: THE EU IS ASKING FOR FEEDBACK ON FRONTIER AI REGULATION
articles.summary: The European AI Office is seeking expert feedback on interpreting key obligations for governing general-purpose AI (GPAI) under the EU AI Act. Major AI labs have agreed to align with these Codes of Practice, which will set a compliance baseline. Key topics include systemic risk thresholds, training compute estimation, and downstream fine-tuner responsibilities. Feedback is open until May 22.

articles.title: DEEPMIND SHOWCASED ALPHAFOLD 3'S EXPANDED MOLECULAR PREDICTION ABILITIES
articles.summary: DeepMind's AlphaFold 3 has new capabilities to predict DNA, RNA, and molecule structures. It also has improved accuracy for complex molecular interactions. The tool is now free for non-commercial use through EMBL-EBI.

articles.title: INTRODUCING MOBILITY AI: ADVANCING URBAN TRANSPORTATION
articles.summary: Google Research built new ML models to analyze congestion, parking, and travel demand patterns. The tools also estimated greenhouse gas reductions and transportation safety impacts. The project advanced urban mobility planning using geospatial and real-time data.

articles.title: HOW TO BUILD A SECURITY CHAMPIONS PROGRAM
articles.summary: Security Champions programs are a proven way to scale AppSec across dev teams. Join Snyk's live webinar on May 15 @ 11AM ET and earn bonus

articles.title: CPE credits. Save your spot now!
GOOGLE CLOUD WAN FOR THE AI ERA
articles.summary: Google shares how its global WAN evolved to support resilient cloud services, which maintained connectivity during the West African cable outages.

articles.title: ADOBE AND FIGMA TOOLS ARE GETTING CHATGPT'S UPGRADED IMAGE GENERATION MODEL
articles.summary: OpenAI made its upgraded image generator model accessible to other companies via the "gpt-image-1" API.

articles.title: FIGMA 2025 AI REPORT: PERSPECTIVES
articles.summary: Figma surveyed designers and found strong optimism for AI-driven creative workflows in 2025.
